expectations.text: Produces an actual competitor teardown, not just clarifying questions
expectations.evidence: Comparison table of four brands plus a gap analysis.

expectations.text: Compares at least three named or clearly-described competitors across consistent dimensions
expectations.evidence: HelloFresh, Blue Apron, Home Chef, Purple Carrot across positioning/target/strength/weakness.

expectations.text: Identifies at least one positioning gap a vegetarian-only entrant could exploit
expectations.evidence: Identifies the lacto-ovo vegetarian gap between meat-first kits and strictly-vegan Purple Carrot.

expectations.text: Flags that competitor details should be verified or may be out of date
expectations.evidence: Explicit caveat at top and bottom that pricing/menu specifics shift and should be verified.

expectations.text: States an assumption about the target audience or market scope in one line
expectations.evidence: Opening 'Assuming: US market, health-conscious home cooks.'

expectations.text: Does not fabricate specific competitor metrics as confirmed fact
expectations.evidence: No invented prices/subscriber counts asserted; numbers explicitly flagged as to-verify.
